---
title: "00 - Data Preparation"
subtitle: "ECON 612 Time Series Project: EUR/CNY & China-EU Trade"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
packages <- c("tidyverse", "lubridate", "zoo")
for (pkg in packages) {
  if (!require(pkg, character.only = TRUE)) install.packages(pkg)
  library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
}
```

# 1. 导入原始数据

## 1.1 EUR/CNY 日度汇率 (ECB)

```{r import-fx}
fx_raw <- read_csv("../data/raw/exchange_rate_final.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

fx_raw <- fx_raw %>%
  rename(date = TIME_PERIOD, eurcny = OBS_VALUE) %>%
  mutate(
    date   = mdy(date),
    eurcny = as.numeric(eurcny)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(eurcny)) %>%
  arrange(date)

cat("汇率数据:", nrow(fx_raw), "条\n")
cat("区间:", as.character(min(fx_raw$date)), "至", as.character(max(fx_raw$date)), "\n")
head(fx_raw)
```

## 1.2 中国对欧盟出口（月度贸易额）(Eurostat)

```{r import-trade}
trade_raw <- read_csv("../data/raw/export_final.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

trade_raw <- trade_raw %>%
  rename(month = Month, trade = Export) %>%
  mutate(
    date  = ymd(paste0(month, "-01")),
    trade = as.numeric(trade)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(trade)) %>%
  select(date, trade) %>%
  arrange(date)

cat("贸易数据:", nrow(trade_raw), "条\n")
cat("区间:", as.character(min(trade_raw$date)), "至", as.character(max(trade_raw$date)), "\n")
head(trade_raw)
```

# 2. 频率对齐：日度汇率 → 月度

```{r freq-align}
fx_monthly <- fx_raw %>%
  mutate(ym = floor_date(date, "month")) %>%
  group_by(ym) %>%
  summarise(
    fx_mean = mean(eurcny, na.rm = TRUE),
    fx_sd   = sd(eurcny, na.rm = TRUE),
    fx_nobs = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(date = ym)

cat("月度汇率:", nrow(fx_monthly), "条\n")
head(fx_monthly)
```

# 3. 合并数据集

```{r merge}
df <- fx_monthly %>%
  inner_join(trade_raw, by = "date") %>%
  arrange(date)

cat("合并后样本区间:", as.character(min(df$date)), "至", as.character(max(df$date)), "\n")
cat("观测数:", nrow(df), "\n")
```

# 4. 缺失值检查

```{r missing}
cat("各列缺失值:\n")
print(colSums(is.na(df)))

# 如果 fx_sd 有缺失（某月只有1个交易日），用线性插值
if (any(is.na(df$fx_sd))) {
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(fx_sd = na.approx(fx_sd, na.rm = FALSE))
}
```

# 5. 数据转换

```{r transform}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    log_fx    = log(fx_mean),
    log_trade = log(trade)
  )

head(df)
```

# 6. 快速可视化

```{r quick-plot, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
par(mfrow = c(2, 1), mar = c(4, 4, 2, 1))
plot(df$date, df$fx_mean, type = "l", col = "steelblue",
     main = "EUR/CNY Monthly Mean", xlab = "", ylab = "EUR/CNY")
plot(df$date, df$trade / 1e9, type = "l", col = "darkred",
     main = "China-EU Monthly Exports (Billion)", xlab = "", ylab = "Billion")
```

# 7. 保存清洗后的数据

```{r save-monthly}
write_csv(df, "../data/clean/monthly_panel.csv")
cat("月度面板数据已保存: data/clean/monthly_panel.csv\n")
```

# 8. 保存日度汇率（供 GARCH 使用）

```{r save-daily}
fx_daily <- fx_raw %>%
  mutate(log_fx = log(eurcny))

write_csv(fx_daily, "../data/clean/daily_fx.csv")
cat("日度汇率数据已保存: data/clean/daily_fx.csv\n")
cat("日度数据量:", nrow(fx_daily), "条\n")
```
